routes.name: Health
routes.description: Operational health check: goroutine count, task counts, uptime.

routes.name: GetSpanStats
routes.description: Aggregate span timing statistics across all tasks.

routes.name: GetRuntimeStatus
routes.description: Live server internals: pending goroutines, memory, task states, containers.

routes.name: BoardManifest
routes.description: Board manifest as seen by a hypothetical new task (no self-task, no worktree mounts).

routes.name: TaskBoardManifest
routes.description: Board manifest as it appeared to a specific task (is_self=true, MountWorktrees applied).

routes.name: GetFiles
routes.description: File listing for @ mention autocomplete.

routes.name: GetConfig
routes.description: Get server configuration (workspaces, autoimplement flags, sandbox list).

routes.name: UpdateConfig
routes.description: Update server configuration (autoimplement, autotest, autosubmit, sandbox assignments).

routes.name: BrowseWorkspaces
routes.description: List child directories for an absolute host path.

routes.name: MkdirWorkspace
routes.description: Create a new directory under an absolute host path.

routes.name: RenameWorkspace
routes.description: Rename a directory at an absolute host path.

routes.name: UpdateWorkspaces
routes.description: Replace the active workspace set and switch the scoped task board.

routes.name: ListRoutines
routes.description: List routine task cards with their schedules and next-run times.

routes.name: CreateRoutine
routes.description: Create a new routine card that spawns instance tasks on a fixed interval.

routes.name: UpdateRoutineSchedule
routes.description: Update a routine's interval or enabled flag; unset fields are left unchanged.

routes.name: TriggerRoutine
routes.description: Fire a routine immediately, bypassing the schedule; the scheduled cycle continues.

routes.name: ListAgents
routes.description: List all registered sub-agent roles (built-in catalog).

routes.name: GetAgent
routes.description: Get one agent's full descriptor including its prompt template body.

routes.name: CreateAgent
routes.description: Create a user-authored agent (rejects slugs that shadow a built-in).

routes.name: UpdateAgent
routes.description: Update a user-authored agent; 409 for built-in slugs.

routes.name: DeleteAgent
routes.description: Delete a user-authored agent; 409 for built-in slugs.

routes.name: ListFlows
routes.description: List all registered flows (built-in catalog).

routes.name: GetFlow
routes.description: Get one flow's full descriptor including its step chain and agent names.

routes.name: CreateFlow
routes.description: Create a user-authored flow (rejects slugs that shadow a built-in).

routes.name: UpdateFlow
routes.description: Update a user-authored flow; 409 for built-in slugs.

routes.name: DeleteFlow
routes.description: Delete a user-authored flow; 409 for built-in slugs.

routes.name: GetSpecTree
routes.description: Get the full spec tree with metadata and progress.

routes.name: SpecTreeStream
routes.description: SSE stream of spec tree change notifications.

routes.name: GetGraph
routes.description: Get the unified spec+task dependency graph (nodes, typed edges, critical path, blocked set) for the Map.

routes.name: StaleCandidates
routes.description: Advisory scan: complete specs whose affects files changed since the spec's updated date. No mutation; returns {candidates:[{path,files,reason}]}.

routes.name: DismissAllStaleCandidates
routes.description: Bulk-dismiss every stale candidate by bumping its updated timestamp (status unchanged), one commit per workspace. Returns {dismissed:N}.

routes.name: SpecTransition
routes.description: Spec lifecycle transition. Body {action, ...}: dispatch/undispatch take paths[] (and run for dispatch) and return per-spec arrays; archive/unarchive/validate/stale/dismiss-stale/force-complete take a single path and return {path, status}.

routes.name: ListSpecComments
routes.description: List cloud-resident spec comment threads for the visible repos, each repositioned against the current spec body (orphaned flag set when the anchor is lost).

routes.name: SubmitSpecComment
routes.description: Forward a spec-comment op (create/reply/resolve/reopen) up the coordination connection. The coordinator is authoritative and echoes the result back over the SSE stream.

routes.name: StreamSpecComments
routes.description: SSE stream of spec-comment events relayed from the coordinator (create/reply/resolve/reopen/sync).

routes.name: GetCoordinationStatus
routes.description: Report whether the coordination opt-in is enabled (and available).

routes.name: SetCoordinationOptIn
routes.description: Flip the coordination opt-in (the data-boundary gate). Body {enabled}.

routes.name: GetAgentSessionStatus
routes.description: Get agent session status.

routes.name: StartAgentSession
routes.description: Start the agent session.

routes.name: StopAgentSession
routes.description: Stop the agent session.

routes.name: GetAgentMessages
routes.description: Retrieve conversation history.

routes.name: SendAgentMessage
routes.description: Send a user message, triggers agent exec.

routes.name: ClearAgentMessages
routes.description: Clear conversation history.

routes.name: StreamAgentMessages
routes.description: Stream the agent's response tokens.

routes.name: InterruptAgentMessage
routes.description: Interrupt the current agent turn.

routes.name: UndoPlanningRound
routes.description: Undo the last agent-session round (git reset --hard on the last commit carrying the Plan-Round trailer).

routes.name: GetAgentCommands
routes.description: List available slash commands.

routes.name: UpdateTaskPromptTool
routes.description: Tool endpoint: update a task's prompt from a task-mode agent session.

routes.name: ListAgentSessions
routes.description: List agent sessions for the current workspace group.

routes.name: CreateAgentSession
routes.description: Create a new agent session.

routes.name: PatchAgentSession
routes.description: Mutate an agent session: {name} renames; {state: archived|visible|active} archives, restores, or activates it.

routes.name: DeleteAgentSession
routes.description: Permanently delete an archived agent session and its stored conversation.

routes.name: GetEnvConfig
routes.description: Get environment configuration (tokens masked).

routes.name: UpdateEnvConfig
routes.description: Update environment file; omitted/empty token fields are preserved.

routes.name: TestSandbox
routes.description: Test sandbox configuration by running a lightweight probe task.

routes.name: ListSystemPrompts
routes.description: List all built-in system prompt templates with override status and content.

routes.name: GetSystemPrompt
routes.description: Get a single built-in system prompt template by name.

routes.name: UpdateSystemPrompt
routes.description: Write a user override for a built-in system prompt template; validates the template before writing.

routes.name: DeleteSystemPrompt
routes.description: Remove the user override for a built-in system prompt template, restoring the embedded default.

routes.name: ListTemplates
routes.description: List all prompt templates sorted by created_at descending.

routes.name: CreateTemplate
routes.description: Create a new named prompt template.

routes.name: DeleteTemplate
routes.description: Delete a prompt template by ID.

routes.name: GetWhiteboard
routes.description: Load the active workspace's whiteboard scene JSON (empty body when none saved yet).

routes.name: PutWhiteboard
routes.description: Save the active workspace's whiteboard scene JSON.

routes.name: GitStatus
routes.description: Git status for all mounted workspaces.

routes.name: GitStatusStream
routes.description: SSE stream of git status updates for all workspaces.

routes.name: GitPush
routes.description: Push a workspace to its remote.

routes.name: GitSyncWorkspace
routes.description: Fetch and rebase a workspace onto its upstream branch.

routes.name: GitRebaseOnMain
routes.description: Fetch origin/<main> and rebase the current branch on top.

routes.name: GitBranches
routes.description: List branches for a workspace.

routes.name: GitCheckout
routes.description: Switch a workspace to a different branch.

routes.name: GitCreateBranch
routes.description: Create and check out a new branch in a workspace.

routes.name: OpenFolder
routes.description: Open a workspace directory in the OS file manager.

routes.name: GetUsageStats
routes.description: Aggregated token and cost usage statistics.

routes.name: GetStats
routes.description: Task status and workspace cost statistics. Optional ?workspace=<repo-root-path> restricts aggregation to tasks for that workspace (400 if no tasks match).

routes.name: ListTasks
routes.description: List all tasks (optionally including archived).

routes.name: StreamTasks
routes.description: SSE stream: full snapshot then incremental task-updated/task-deleted events.

routes.name: CreateTask
routes.description: Create a new task in the backlog.

routes.name: BatchCreateTasks
routes.description: Create multiple tasks atomically with symbolic dependency wiring.

routes.name: GenerateMissingTitles
routes.description: Bulk-generate titles for tasks that lack one.

routes.name: GenerateMissingOversight
routes.description: Bulk-generate oversight summaries for eligible tasks.

routes.name: SearchTasks
routes.description: Search tasks by keyword.

routes.name: ArchiveAllDone
routes.description: Archive all tasks in the done state.

routes.name: ListSummaries
routes.description: List immutable task summaries for completed tasks (cost dashboard, no full task.json read).

routes.name: ListDeletedTasks
routes.description: List soft-deleted (tombstoned) tasks that are within the retention window.

routes.name: UpdateTask
routes.description: Update task fields: status (incl. status=cancelled, which kills the worker and cleans worktrees), prompt, timeout, sandbox, dependencies, fresh_start, archived (true/false), deleted=false (restore).

routes.name: DeleteTask
routes.description: Soft-delete a task (tombstone); data retained within retention window.

routes.name: GetEvents
routes.description: Task event timeline (state changes, outputs, feedback, errors).

routes.name: SubmitFeedback
routes.description: Submit a feedback message to a waiting task.

routes.name: CompleteTask
routes.description: Mark a waiting task as done and trigger commit-and-push.

routes.name: ResumeTask
routes.description: Resume a failed or waiting task using its existing session.

routes.name: SyncTask
routes.description: Rebase task worktrees onto the latest default branch.

routes.name: TestTask
routes.description: Trigger the test agent for a task.

routes.name: AgonTask
routes.description: Trigger adversarial agon verification for a task.

routes.name: AgonTranscript
routes.description: Read the agon verification trajectory (per-fork, per-round transcripts).

routes.name: TaskLineage
routes.description: Read the agent-graph lineage (nodes + edges) of an agentic-flow run.

routes.name: TaskDiff
routes.description: Git diff of task worktrees versus the default branch.

routes.name: StreamLogs
routes.description: SSE stream of live container logs for a running task.

routes.name: ServeOutput
routes.description: Raw Claude Code output file for a single agent turn.

routes.name: GetTurnUsage
routes.description: Per-turn token usage breakdown for a task.

routes.name: GetTaskSpans
routes.description: Span timing statistics for a task.

routes.name: GetOversight
routes.description: Oversight summary for a task. ?phase=impl (default) or ?phase=test selects the implementation- or test-agent summary.

routes.name: RebuildIndex
routes.description: Rebuild the in-memory search index from disk; returns the number of repaired entries.

routes.name: ExplorerTree
routes.description: List one level of a workspace directory.

routes.name: ExplorerStream
routes.description: SSE stream of file tree change notifications for workspace directories.

routes.name: ExplorerReadFile
routes.description: Read file contents from a workspace.

routes.name: ExplorerWriteFile
routes.description: Write file contents to a workspace.

routes.name: ExplorerFileStream
routes.description: SSE stream that notifies when a single watched file's contents change.

routes.name: ExplorerTaskPrompts
routes.description: List backlog (and optionally waiting) tasks as virtual entries for the workspace explorer Task Prompts section.

routes.name: StartOAuth
routes.description: Start an OAuth authorization flow for the given provider (claude or codex).

routes.name: OAuthStatus
routes.description: Poll the current status of an OAuth flow for the given provider.

routes.name: CancelOAuth
routes.description: Cancel an in-progress OAuth flow for the given provider.

routes.name: Login
routes.description: Redirect to the latere.ai auth service to begin sign-in.

routes.name: Callback
routes.description: OAuth2 authorization-code callback; sets the session cookie.

routes.name: Logout
routes.description: Clear the local session and redirect to the auth service logout.

routes.name: LogoutNotify
routes.description: Front-channel logout target: clear the local cookie when the user signs out centrally.

routes.name: AuthMe
routes.description: Return the current signed-in user, or 204 when unauthenticated.

routes.name: AuthOrgs
routes.description: List the signed-in user's organizations; 204 when single-org or unauthenticated.

routes.name: PatchAuthMe
routes.description: Mutate the signed-in principal — currently only org_id (active organization). Clears session and returns a redirect to /login?org_id=<target>.

routes.name: SwitchOrg
routes.description: Switch the active organization (latere-ui session convention). Validates membership, clears the session, and returns {redirect} to /login?org_id=<target>.

routes.name: AuthDeviceStart
routes.description: Local-mode RFC 8628 device-code: start a sign-in flow and return the user code + verification URI.

routes.name: AuthDevicePoll
routes.description: Poll the in-flight local-mode device-code flow; returns {status: idle|pending|done|denied|expired}.

routes.name: AuthDeviceCancel
routes.description: Cancel the in-flight local-mode device-code flow.

routes.name: GitHubAuthStatus
routes.description: GitHub connection state for the principal: connected, login, account, granted permissions, and whether the connect flow is available.

routes.name: GitHubAuthConnect
routes.description: Start the brokered "Latere AI" GitHub App install + grant flow. Gated on the ../auth broker.

routes.name: GitHubAuthDisconnect
routes.description: Disconnect GitHub by clearing the principal's stored token.

routes.name: GitHubRepos
routes.description: List repositories the "Latere AI" install grants the principal (the install grant is the org boundary).

routes.name: GitHubRepoSelect
routes.description: Validate a chosen repo is within the install grant and resolve it to its canonical host/owner/repo identity.

routes.name: GitHubPulls
routes.description: List pull requests for the selected repo (?repo=owner/name&state=open|closed|all).

routes.name: GitHubPull
routes.description: Pull request detail plus its conversation comment thread (?repo=owner/name).

routes.name: GitHubIssues
routes.description: List issues for the selected repo, excluding pull requests (?repo=owner/name&state=open|closed|all).

routes.name: GitHubIssue
routes.description: Issue detail plus its conversation comment thread (?repo=owner/name).
